Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
77 
PRVDR_CHIP_ENRLMT_IND 
LABEL: 
Enrolled in CHIP Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider was enrolled in the CHIP program; ever in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CHIP_ENRLMT_IND 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_CHIP_ENRLMT_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR base 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes
